prizeMoneyScope.notes: Total Australian Open 2025 prize money across tournament events. Official AO/Tennis Australia sources describe the value as prize money or prize pool; no separate per-diem or player-support component is identified in the cited sources.

prizePool.notes: Official AO/Tennis Australia 2025 total prize pool. The Tennis Australia PDF lists a 2025 total of A$96.5m with all figures in Australian dollars; the AO article says players compete for A$96.5m in prize money at Australian Open 2025.

revenue.notes: No AO-specific Australian Open 2025 tournament revenue denominator is included; Tennis Australia organization-level financials are not treated as tournament revenue.

profitOrSurplus.notes: No AO-specific Australian Open 2025 tournament profit or surplus denominator is included; Tennis Australia organization-level surplus is not treated as tournament profit/surplus.

caveats: Prize-money numerator is Australian Open 2025 total prize pool of A$96.5m from official AO/Tennis Australia sources.

Tennis Australia organization-level revenue or surplus must remain separate from Australian Open tournament denominators unless a source bridges the scope explicitly.

prizeMoneyScope.notes: Total tennis events prize money across Wimbledon 2025 competition events. Excludes estimated per diems from the broader total prize money line.

prizePool.notes: Official Wimbledon PDF line for total tennis events prize money. The broader total prize money line is £53.5m including £1.5m estimated per diems, which this clean competition-prize-money row excludes.

revenue.notes: AELTC Championships Ltd turnover for the year ended 31 July 2025. The company is the principal contracting party for The Championships; turnover includes ticket, broadcast, marketing, retail, food and drink income net of trade discounts, VAT, and other sales-related taxes.

profitOrSurplus.notes: AELTC Championships Ltd operating profit for the year ended 31 July 2025, before net finance income, division of net available surplus to LTA Operations, taxation, and dividends.

caveats: Prize-money numerator is Wimbledon 2025 total tennis events prize money, excluding £1.5m estimated per diems from the broader £53.5m total prize money line.
Revenue denominator is AELTC Championships Ltd operating-company turnover for the year ended 31 July 2025, not a separate cash ledger for only the tournament fortnight.
Profit/surplus denominator is AELTC Championships Ltd operating profit before finance income, net available surplus division to LTA Operations, taxation, and dividends.
Net available surplus, after-tax profit, dividends, and AELTC/LTA organization-level values are not used as this row's denominator.

prizeMoneyScope.notes: Total US Open 2025 competition prize money across tournament competitions. Derived from the official $90m total player-compensation package by excluding the official $5m travel and hotel support component, and corroborated by AP's $85m competition-prize-money report.

prizePool.notes: Official US Open release says 2025 total player compensation is $90m and separately identifies $5m in overall travel and hotel support before the prize-money breakdown. AP corroborates $85m in 2025 US Open prize money across competitions.

revenue.notes: No clear tournament-specific US Open 2025 revenue source is included; USTA organization-level financials are not treated as tournament denominators.

profitOrSurplus.notes: No clear tournament-specific US Open 2025 profit or surplus source is included; USTA organization-level financials are not treated as tournament denominators.

caveats: Prize-money numerator is US Open 2025 competition prize money of $85m, derived by excluding the official $5m travel and hotel support component from the official $90m total player-compensation package.
The existing $90m US Open total-player-compensation row remains separate because it includes support/expense coverage and is not a clean competition-prize-money numerator.
